instruction: Building a boat step by step (step 6 of 6). So far you've drawn: wave-1, hull, mast, sail, flag. Add the next part: polyline (points 16,116 32,112 48,116 64,112 80,116 96,112 112,116, fill none, stroke #3b82f6, stroke-width 1) with id "wave-2".
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <polyline id="wave-1" fill="none" stroke="#3b82f6" stroke-width="2" fill="none" points="8,108 24,104 40,108 56,104 72,108 88,104 104,108 120,104" />
  <polygon id="hull" fill="#92400e" points="16,88 112,88 96,104 32,104" />
  <line id="mast" stroke="#222" stroke-width="3" x1="64" y1="88" x2="64" y2="16" />
  <polygon id="sail" fill="#fde047" points="64,20 96,72 64,72" />
  <polygon id="flag" fill="#e63946" points="64,16 76,20 64,24" />
</svg>
target_svg:
